title: 指鹿为马
meaning: 比喻颠倒黑白，混淆是非

scenes.title: 指着鹿
scenes.prompt: A minister pointing at a deer, cartoon style, court scene
scenes.narration: 赵高牵来一只鹿，对皇帝说是马。

scenes.title: 大臣争论
scenes.prompt: Court officials arguing about deer or horse, cartoon style, political scene
scenes.narration: 大臣们有的说是鹿，有的附和说是马。

scenes.title: 忠臣被害
scenes.prompt: Honest officials being punished, cartoon style, dark scene
scenes.narration: 说是鹿的忠臣后来都被赵高害死了。
